docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO VICTOR VOLONOKOV ON APR-24-2006 OFF CALENDAR. AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY, LETTER RECEIVED MARCH 9, 2006.

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION SERVED DEC-19-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VOLONOKOV, VICTOR PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JAN-30-2006 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VOLONOKOV, VICTOR OEX HEARING SET FOR APR-24-2006 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 610

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VOLONOKOV, VICTOR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLONOKOV, VICTOR $2,019.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.61 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,178.61, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $2178.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON ORDER OF EXAMINATION; NTC TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AT OEX FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VOLONOKOV, VICTOR
